_comment: Goody-hut (discovery-site) reward table (§9, game-data.md §24). The first land unit to enter a hut consumes it and rolls one reward weighted by `weight` (0 = only rolled where a difficulty overrides it upward via difficulties.json `goody_weights`, id -> weight; each difficulty column there sums to 100). Effect verbs are read by Events.exploration_reward: treasury (min..max gold), experience (min..max XP to the unit), heal (unit to full health; `damage_prereq` gates it to a discoverer that has lost at least that % of max health, else re-roll), map (signal-only reveal, no sim state: `radius` tiles centred on the least-explored point within `offset` tiles of the site, each tile included with `reveal_chance`%), unit (spawn `unit_type` for the discoverer), tech (grant a free researchable tech), ambush (the discoverer takes `damage`% and each legal adjacent tile has `spawn_chance`% to spawn a wild `spawn_unit` (owner -2), minimum `min_spawn`). A `bad: true` reward is re-rolled when it cannot apply (no placeable raider, or wild forces still suppressed by the era's quiet phase) and never lands on a recon-classification discoverer. Magnitudes live here so the table is the single source of reward tuning.
